title: PacBio (PACB) Q4 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Top
text: PacBio exited Q4 2022 with in-line earnings and better-than-expected revenues. PacBio registered revenues of $27.4 million in Q4 2022, down 24.1% year-over-year, but surpassed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.2%. PacBio delivered adjusted loss per share of 35 cents in Q4 2022, which was in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. Consumables revenues for Q4 2022 were $16.7 million, up 11.3% from the prior-year quarter, comparing favorably to the Q4 projection of $12.8 million. Analysts had generally reconfirmed their estimates over the last 30 days, suggesting they anticipated the business to stay the course heading into earnings.
